source_commit: 8e440f5 task6-ddr3: expose native WDF FIFO counters
interpretation: v93 did not reach the native write/read BIST. The added generated-core WDF counter/debug patch regressed the DFII/init path or early Wishbone/DFII sequencing, so this result cannot answer the native write-data question. Next fix should reduce the instrumentation footprint and preserve v92/v87 init behavior before adding counters again.
